items.title: Craft > slop I love using AI to generate things too but craft is in that last 10% wher…
items.title_zh: 工艺 > slop 我也喜欢使用 AI 来生成东西，但工艺是最后 10% 的地方……
items.description: Craft > slop I love using AI to generate things too but craft is in that last 10% where you manually apply your taste to make something you can be proud of. Many people never bother.
items.description_zh: 工艺 > slop 我也喜欢使用 AI 来生成东西，但工艺是在最后 10% 中，你可以手动运用自己的品味来制作一些你可以自豪的东西。很多人从不打扰。

items.title: You don’t have access to Mythos 🫵🤭 Doesn’t mean you can just sit around and wait.

items.description: You don’t have access to Mythos 🫵🤭 Doesn’t mean you can just sit around and wait. Replit published a whitepaper showing you can get significantly better performance from current gen LLMs (90%+ in some cases) by combining with static anal…
items.description_zh: 您无权访问 Mythos 🫵🤭 并不意味着您可以坐下来等待。 Replit 发布了一份白皮书，显示通过与静态分析相结合，您可以从当前一代 LLM 获得显着更好的性能（在某些情况下 90%+）……
